## 高等数学A

## 第6章 多元函数微分学

## 6.2 多元函数微分法

6．2．1 复合函数的微分法
6．2．2 全微分形式不变性

中南大学开放式精品示范课堂高等数学建设组

## 6.2 多元函数微分法

6．2．1 复合函数微分法 $\left\{\begin{array}{l}\text { 多元复合函数一阶偏导数 } \\ \text { 多元复合函数一阶偏导数习例1－4 } \\ \text { 多元复合函数的高阶偏导数 } \\ \text { 多元复合函数高阶偏导数习例5－7 } \\ \text { 6．2．2 全微分形式不变性 }\left\{\begin{array}{l}\text { 一阶微分形式的不变性 } \\ \text { 一阶微分形式的不变性习例8－11 } \\ \text { 内容小结 } \\ \text { 思考题 }\end{array}\right.\end{array}\right.$

## 一、多元复合函数的微分法

## 1．多元复合函数一阶偏导数

定理 若（1）$u=u(x, y), v=v(x, y)$ 在点（ $x, y$ ）可偏导；
$(2) z=f(u, v)$ 在相应点 $(u, v)$ 有连续偏导则 $z=f[u(x, y), v(x, y)]$ 在 $(x, y)$ 可偏导，且

$$
\begin{aligned}
& \frac{\partial z}{\partial x}=\frac{\partial z}{\partial u} \cdot \frac{\partial u}{\partial x}+\frac{\partial z}{\partial v} \cdot \frac{\partial v}{\partial x}=\left(\begin{array}{ll}
f_{1}^{\prime} & f_{2}^{\prime}
\end{array}\right)\binom{u_{x}}{v_{x}} \\
& \frac{\partial z}{\partial y}=\frac{\partial z}{\partial u} \cdot \frac{\partial u}{\partial y}+\frac{\partial z}{\partial v} \cdot \frac{\partial v}{\partial y}=\left(\begin{array}{ll}
f_{1}^{\prime} & f_{2}^{\prime}
\end{array}\right)\binom{u_{y}}{v_{y}}
\end{aligned}
$$

$(1) z=f(u, v)$ 仅有偏导，定理失效。
（2）$z=f(u, v)$ 有连续偏导，可减弱到可微。
（3）利用公式计算复合函数的偏导数时，首先要搞清楚函数的复合过程，哪个是自变量，哪个是中间变量，常用树枝图表示。
![](https://cdn.mathpix.com/cropped/21c19573-86ad-4a68-a129-1e9867cf349f-04.jpg?height=503&width=607&top_left_y=796&top_left_x=1650)
（4）对自变量求偏导数时，先要经过一切有关的中间变量，最后归结到自变量。

## 一些具体情形讨论如下：

$(1) z=f(u, v, w), u=\varphi(x, y), v=\psi(x, y), w=\omega(x, y)$
![](https://cdn.mathpix.com/cropped/21c19573-86ad-4a68-a129-1e9867cf349f-05.jpg?height=601&width=670&top_left_y=398&top_left_x=150)
$\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}=\frac{\partial f}{\partial u} \cdot \frac{\partial u}{\partial x}+\frac{\partial f}{\partial v} \cdot \frac{\partial v}{\partial x}+\frac{\partial f}{\partial w} \cdot \frac{\partial w}{\partial x} =\left(\begin{array}{lll}\frac{\partial f}{\partial u} & \frac{\partial f}{\partial v} & \frac{\partial f}{\partial w}\end{array}\right) \cdot\left(\begin{array}{l}\frac{\partial u}{\partial x} \\ \frac{\partial v}{\partial x} \\ \frac{\partial w}{\partial x}\end{array}\right)$

$$
\frac{\partial z}{\partial y}=\frac{\partial f}{\partial u} \cdot \frac{\partial u}{\partial y}+\frac{\partial f}{\partial v} \cdot \frac{\partial v}{\partial y}+\frac{\partial f}{\partial w} \cdot \frac{\partial w}{\partial y}=\left(\begin{array}{ll}
\frac{\partial f}{\partial u} & \frac{\partial f}{\partial v}
\end{array} \frac{\partial f}{\partial w}\right) \cdot\left(\begin{array}{l}
\frac{\partial y}{\partial v} \\
\frac{\partial v}{\partial y} \\
\frac{\partial w}{\partial y}
\end{array}\right)
$$

![](https://cdn.mathpix.com/cropped/21c19573-86ad-4a68-a129-1e9867cf349f-06.jpg?height=1576&width=2246&top_left_y=248&top_left_x=115)
(3) $z=f(u), u=\varphi(x, y)$
<img class="imgSvg" id = "mqirgenrqzto6blc5v" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/>

$$
\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}=\frac{d f}{d u} \cdot \frac{\partial u}{\partial x} \quad \frac{\partial z}{\partial y}=\frac{d f}{d u} \cdot \frac{\partial u}{\partial y}
$$

$(4) z=f(u, v), u=\varphi(x), v=\psi(x)$
![](https://cdn.mathpix.com/cropped/21c19573-86ad-4a68-a129-1e9867cf349f-07.jpg?height=232&width=515&top_left_y=946&top_left_x=380)

$$
\frac{d z}{d x}=\frac{\partial f}{\partial u} \cdot \frac{d u}{d x}+\frac{\partial f}{\partial v} \cdot \frac{d v}{d x}
$$

$(5) z=f(u, v, w), u=\varphi(t), v=\psi(t), w=\omega(t)$
<img class="imgSvg" id = "mqirgeo4x92yzm59rkp" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHNwYW4gY2xhc3M9InNtaWxlcy1lcnJvciIgc3R5bGU9ImJhY2tncm91bmQtY29sb3I6IHllbGxvdzsgY29sb3I6IHJlZDsiPlN5bnRheEVycm9yOiBFeHBlY3RlZCAiKiIsICJhcyIsICJzZSIsIFsxLTldLCBbQS1aXSwgb3IgW2Jjbm9wc10gYnV0ICJbIiBmb3VuZC48L3NwYW4+"/>

$$
\frac{d z}{d t}=\frac{\partial f}{\partial u} \cdot \frac{d u}{d t}+\frac{\partial f}{\partial v} \cdot \frac{d v}{d t}+\frac{\partial f}{\partial w} \cdot \frac{d w}{d t}
$$

$$
\begin{aligned}
& \text { (6) } z=f(u, x), u=\varphi(x) \\
& z<x \\
& (7) z=f(u, v, t), u=\varphi(t), v=\psi(t) \\
& z=\frac{d z}{d x}=\frac{\partial f}{\partial u} \cdot \frac{d u}{d x}+\frac{\partial f}{\partial x} \\
& z=t \quad \frac{d z}{d t}=\frac{\partial f}{\partial u} \cdot \frac{d u}{d t}+\frac{\partial f}{\partial v} \cdot \frac{d v}{d t}+\frac{\partial f}{\partial t}
\end{aligned}
$$

注意：当函数复合后，最终的自变量只有一个时求全导，其它情况都得求偏导。
为了记法上方便，常用以下记号：

$$
\frac{\partial f(u, v)}{\partial u}=f_{1}^{\prime}=f_{1}, \quad \frac{\partial^{2} f(u, v)}{\partial v \partial u}=f_{21}^{\prime \prime}=f_{21}
$$

## 2．多元复合函数一阶偏导数习例

例1 设 $u=F(x, y, z), z=f(x, y), y=\varphi(x)$ ，求 $\frac{d u}{d x}$ 。
例2 设 $z=u^{v}, u=x^{2}+y^{2}, v=x y$ ，求 $\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}, \frac{\partial z}{\partial y}$ ．
例3 设 $u=f(x, y, z)=e^{x^{2}+y^{2}+z^{2}}, z=x^{2} \sin y$ ，求 $\frac{\partial u}{\partial x}, \frac{\partial u}{\partial y}$ ．
例 4 设 $z=\frac{y}{f\left(\frac{y}{x}\right)}$ ，求 $\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}, \frac{\partial z}{\partial y}$ ．

例1 设 $u=F(x, y, z), z=f(x, y), y=\varphi(x)$ ，求 $\frac{d u}{d x}$ ．解
![](https://cdn.mathpix.com/cropped/21c19573-86ad-4a68-a129-1e9867cf349f-10.jpg?height=440&width=775&top_left_y=611&top_left_x=432)

$$
\begin{aligned}
\frac{d u}{d x} & =\frac{\partial F}{\partial x}+\frac{\partial F}{\partial y} \cdot \frac{d y}{d x}+\frac{\partial F}{\partial z}\left(\frac{\partial f}{\partial x}+\frac{\partial f}{\partial y} \cdot \frac{d y}{d x}\right) \\
& =F_{1}^{\prime}+F_{2}^{\prime} \varphi^{\prime}+F_{3}^{\prime} f_{1}^{\prime}+F_{3}^{\prime} f_{2}^{\prime} \varphi^{\prime}
\end{aligned}
$$

例2 设 $z=u^{v}, u=x^{2}+y^{2}, v=x y$ ，求 $\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}, \frac{\partial z}{\partial y}$ ．
解1
<img class="imgSvg" id = "mqirgeo526nafkcum4i" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/>

$$
\begin{aligned}
\frac{\partial z}{\partial x} & =\frac{\partial z}{\partial u} \cdot \frac{\partial u}{\partial x}+\frac{\partial z}{\partial v} \cdot \frac{\partial v}{\partial x}=v u^{v-1} \cdot 2 x+u^{v} \ln u \cdot y \\
& =\left(x^{2}+y^{2}\right)^{x y-1}\left[2 x^{2} y+y\left(x^{2}+y^{2}\right) \ln \left(x^{2}+y^{2}\right)\right] \\
\frac{\partial z}{\partial y} & =\frac{\partial z}{\partial u} \cdot \frac{\partial u}{\partial y}+\frac{\partial z}{\partial v} \cdot \frac{\partial v}{\partial y}=v u^{v-1} \cdot 2 y+u^{v} \ln u \cdot x \\
& =\left(x^{2}+y^{2}\right)^{x y-1}\left[2 x y^{2}+x\left(x^{2}+y^{2}\right) \ln \left(x^{2}+y^{2}\right)\right]
\end{aligned}
$$

$$
\begin{aligned}
& \frac{\partial z}{\partial x}=\left(\begin{array}{ll}
\frac{\partial z}{\partial u} & \frac{\partial z}{\partial v}
\end{array}\right)\binom{\frac{\partial u}{\partial x}}{\frac{\partial v}{\partial x}}=\left(\begin{array}{ll}
v u^{v-1} & u^{v} \ln u
\end{array}\right)\binom{2 x}{y} \\
&=v u^{v-1} \cdot 2 x+u^{v} \ln u \cdot y \\
&=\left(\begin{array}{ll}
x^{2}+y^{2}
\end{array}\right)^{x y-1}\left[\begin{array}{ll}
2 x^{2} & \left.y+y\left(x^{2}+y^{2}\right) \ln \left(x^{2}+y^{2}\right)\right] \\
\frac{\partial z}{\partial y}=\left(\begin{array}{ll}
\frac{\partial z}{\partial u} & \frac{\partial z}{\partial v}
\end{array}\right)\binom{\frac{\partial u}{\partial y}}{\frac{\partial v}{\partial y}} & =\left(\begin{array}{ll}
v u^{v-1} & u^{v} \ln u
\end{array}\right)\binom{2 y}{x} \\
& =v u^{v-1} \cdot 2 y+u^{v} \ln u \cdot x
\end{array}\right.
\end{aligned}
$$

例3 设 $u=f(x, y, z)=e^{x^{2}+y^{2}+z^{2}}, z=x^{2} \sin y$ ，求 $\frac{\partial u}{\partial x}, \frac{\partial u}{\partial y}$ ．

解1
![](https://cdn.mathpix.com/cropped/21c19573-86ad-4a68-a129-1e9867cf349f-13.jpg?height=457&width=602&top_left_y=565&top_left_x=709)

$$
\begin{aligned}
& \frac{\partial u}{\partial x}=\frac{\partial f}{\partial x}+\frac{\partial f}{\partial z} \cdot \frac{\partial z}{\partial x}=2 x e^{x^{2}+y^{2}+z^{2}}+2 z e^{x^{2}+y^{2}+z^{2}} \cdot 2 x \sin y \\
& \frac{\partial u}{\partial y}=\frac{\partial f}{\partial y}+\frac{\partial f}{\partial z} \cdot \frac{\partial z}{\partial y}=2 y e^{x^{2}+y^{2}+z^{2}}+2 z e^{x^{2}+y^{2}+z^{2}} \cdot x^{2} \cos y
\end{aligned}
$$

$$
\begin{aligned}
& \text { 解2 } \\
& \frac{\partial u}{\partial x}=\left(\begin{array}{lll}
\frac{\partial f}{\partial x} & \frac{\partial f}{\partial y} & \frac{\partial f}{\partial z}
\end{array}\right)\left(\begin{array}{c}
1 \\
0 \\
\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}
\end{array}\right) \\
= & \left(\begin{array}{lll}
2 x e^{x^{2}+y^{2}+z^{2}} & 2 y e^{x^{2}+y^{2}+z^{2}} & 2 z e^{x^{2}+y^{2}+z^{2}}
\end{array}\left(\begin{array}{c}
1 \\
0 \\
2 x \sin y
\end{array}\right)\right. \\
= & 2 x e^{x^{2}+y^{2}+z^{2}}+2 z e^{x^{2}+y^{2}+z^{2}} \cdot 2 x \sin y
\end{aligned}
$$

例4 设 $z=\frac{y}{f\left(\frac{y}{x}\right)}$ ，求 $\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}, \frac{\partial z}{\partial y}$ ．
![](https://cdn.mathpix.com/cropped/21c19573-86ad-4a68-a129-1e9867cf349f-15.jpg?height=313&width=607&top_left_y=294&top_left_x=1668)

解1 令 $u=\frac{y}{x}$ ，则 $z=\frac{y}{f(u)} \stackrel{\text { 令 }}{=} F(y, u)$

$$
\begin{aligned}
\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}=\left(\frac{\partial F}{\partial y}, \frac{\partial F}{\partial u}\right)\left(\frac{\partial u}{\partial x}\right) & =\frac{\partial F}{\partial u} \cdot \frac{\partial u}{\partial x}=y\left(-\frac{f^{\prime}(u)}{f^{2}(u)}\right) \cdot\left(-\frac{y}{x^{2}}\right) \\
\frac{\partial z}{\partial y}=\left(\frac{\partial F}{\partial y}, \frac{\partial F}{\partial u}\right)\left(\frac{1}{\partial y}\right) & =\frac{\partial F}{\partial y}+\frac{\partial F}{\partial u} \cdot \frac{\partial u}{\partial y} \\
& =\frac{1}{f(u)}+y\left(-\frac{f^{\prime}(u)}{f^{2}(u)}\right) \cdot \frac{1}{x}
\end{aligned}
$$

$$
=\frac{1}{f\left(\frac{y}{x}\right)}+y\left(-\frac{f^{\prime}\left(\frac{y}{x}\right)}{f^{2}\left(\frac{y}{x}\right)}\right) \cdot \frac{1}{x} \stackrel{\text { 或 }}{=} \frac{1}{f}+y\left(-\frac{f^{\prime}}{f^{2}}\right) \cdot \frac{1}{x}
$$

解2 直接对 $z=\frac{\boldsymbol{y}}{\boldsymbol{f}\left(\frac{\boldsymbol{y}}{\boldsymbol{x}}\right)}$ 求偏导得：

$$
\begin{aligned}
& \frac{\partial z}{\partial x}=\frac{0-y f^{\prime}\left(\frac{y}{x}\right) \cdot\left(-\frac{y}{x^{2}}\right)}{f^{2}\left(\frac{y}{x}\right)}=\frac{y^{2}}{x^{2}} f^{\prime} \\
& \frac{f^{2}}{\partial y}=\frac{y^{2} f^{\prime}}{x^{2} f^{2}} \\
& \frac{\partial z}{\partial y}=\frac{f\left(\frac{y}{x}\right)-y f^{\prime}\left(\frac{y}{x}\right) \cdot\left(\frac{1}{x}\right)}{f^{2}\left(\frac{y}{x}\right)}=\frac{f-\frac{y}{x} f^{\prime}}{f^{2}}=\frac{x f-y f^{\prime}}{x f^{2}}
\end{aligned}
$$

## 3．多元复合函数的高阶偏导数

设 $u=\varphi(x, y), v=\psi(x, y)$ 在 $(x, y)$ 有二阶连续偏导， $z=f(u, v)$ 在 $(u, v)$ 有二阶连续偏导，
则复合函数 $z=f[\varphi(x, y), \psi(x, y)]$
在 $(x, y)$ 有二阶连续偏导。
求导过程须注意：
![](https://cdn.mathpix.com/cropped/21c19573-86ad-4a68-a129-1e9867cf349f-17.jpg?height=538&width=884&top_left_y=1223&top_left_x=196)

$$
\left(\frac{\partial u}{\partial x}, \frac{\partial u}{\partial y}, \frac{\partial v}{\partial x}, \frac{\partial v}{\partial y}\right)<x
$$

## 4．多元复合函数的高阶偏导数习例

例5 设 $u=f(x+y+z, x y z), f$ 具有二阶连续偏导，求 $\frac{\partial u}{\partial x}, \frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial x \partial z}$ ．例6 设 $u=f(x+y+z+x y z), f$ 具有二阶连续导数，求 $\frac{\partial u}{\partial x}, \frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial x \partial z}$ ．

例7 设 $u=f(x, y)$ 有二阶连续偏导数，将下列表达式：$\frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial x^{2}}+\frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial y^{2}}$ 转化为极坐标形式。

例5 设 $u=f(x+y+z, x y z), f$ 具有二阶连续偏导，求 $\frac{\partial u}{\partial x}, \frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial x \partial z}$ ．
解 $\quad \frac{\partial u}{\partial x}=\left(f_{1}^{\prime}, f_{2}^{\prime}\right)\binom{1}{y z}=f_{1}^{\prime}+y z f_{2}^{\prime}$
其中 $f_{1}^{\prime}=f_{1}^{\prime}(x+y+z, x y z), f_{2}^{\prime}=f_{2}^{\prime}(x+y+z, x y z)$

$$
\begin{aligned}
\therefore \frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial x \partial z} & =\left(f_{11}^{\prime \prime}, f_{12}^{\prime \prime}\right)\binom{1}{x y}+y f_{2}^{\prime}+y z\left(f_{21}^{\prime \prime}, f_{22}^{\prime \prime}\right)\binom{1}{x y} \\
& =f_{11}^{\prime \prime}+f_{12}^{\prime \prime} x y+y f_{2}^{\prime}+y z\left(f_{21}^{\prime \prime}+f_{22}^{\prime \prime} x y\right) \\
& =f_{11}^{\prime \prime}+y(x+z) f_{12}^{\prime \prime}+x y^{2} z f_{22}^{\prime \prime}+y f_{2}^{\prime}
\end{aligned}
$$

例6 设 $u=f(x+y+z+x y z), f$ 具有二阶连续导数，求 $\frac{\partial u}{\partial x}, \frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial x \partial z}$ ．

解 $\quad \frac{\partial u}{\partial x}=f^{\prime} \cdot(1+y z)$
其中 $f^{\prime}=f^{\prime}(x+y+z+x y z)$

$$
\therefore \frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial x \partial z}=f^{\prime \prime} \cdot(1+x y)(1+y z)+f^{\prime} \cdot y
$$

例7 设 $u=f(x, y)$ 有二阶连续偏导数，将下列表达式：$\frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial x^{2}}+\frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial y^{2}}$ 转化为极坐标形式。

解 $\because r=\sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}}, \theta=\operatorname{arctg} \frac{y}{x}$ ，

$$
\begin{aligned}
& \therefore u=u(r, \theta)=u\left(\sqrt{x^{2}+y^{2}}, \operatorname{arctg} \frac{y}{x}\right) \stackrel{\text { 记为 }}{=} f(x, y) \\
& \begin{aligned}
\frac{\partial u}{\partial x}=\frac{\partial u}{\partial r} \cdot \frac{\partial r}{\partial x}+\frac{\partial u}{\partial \theta} \cdot \frac{\partial \theta}{\partial x} & =\frac{x}{r} \frac{\partial u}{\partial r}-\frac{y}{r^{2}} \frac{\partial u}{\partial \theta} \\
& =\frac{\partial u}{\partial r} \cos \theta-\frac{\partial u}{\partial \theta} \cdot \frac{\sin \theta}{r}
\end{aligned}
\end{aligned}
$$

$$
\begin{aligned}
& \frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial x^{2}}=\frac{\partial}{\partial r}\left(\frac{\partial u}{\partial r} \cos \theta-\frac{\partial u}{\partial \theta} \cdot \frac{\sin \theta}{r}\right) \frac{\partial r}{\partial x} \\
& +\frac{\partial}{\partial \theta}\left(\frac{\partial u}{\partial r} \cos \theta-\frac{\partial u}{\partial \theta} \cdot \frac{\sin \theta}{r}\right) \frac{\partial \theta}{\partial x} \\
= & \left(\frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial r^{2}} \cos \theta-\frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial \theta \partial r} \cdot \frac{\sin \theta}{r}+\frac{\partial u}{\partial \theta} \cdot \frac{\sin \theta}{r^{2}}\right) \cos \theta \\
+ & \left(\frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial r \partial \theta} \cos \theta-\frac{\partial u}{\partial r} \sin \theta-\frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial \theta^{2}} \cdot \frac{\sin \theta}{r}-\frac{\partial u}{\partial \theta} \cdot \frac{\cos \theta}{r}\right)\left(-\frac{\sin \theta}{r}\right)
\end{aligned}
$$

$$
=\frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial r^{2}} \cos ^{2} \theta+\frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial \theta^{2}} \frac{\sin ^{2} \theta}{r^{2}}+\frac{\partial u}{\partial r} \frac{\sin ^{2} \theta}{r}-\frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial r \partial \theta} \frac{2 \sin \theta}{r}+\frac{\partial u}{\partial \theta} \frac{\sin 2 \theta}{r^{2}}
$$

同理 $\frac{\partial u}{\partial y}=\frac{\partial u}{\partial r} \cdot \frac{\partial r}{\partial y}+\frac{\partial u}{\partial \theta} \cdot \frac{\partial \theta}{\partial y}=\frac{y}{r} \frac{\partial u}{\partial r}+\frac{x}{r^{2}} \frac{\partial u}{\partial \theta}$

$$
=\frac{\partial u}{\partial r} \sin \theta+\frac{\partial u}{\partial \theta} \frac{\cos \theta}{r}
$$

求得 $\frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial y^{2}}=\cdots$

$$
\therefore \frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial x^{2}}+\frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial y^{2}}=\frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial r^{2}}+\frac{1}{r} \frac{\partial u}{\partial r}+\frac{1}{r^{2}} \frac{\partial^{2} u}{\partial \theta^{2}}
$$

## 二、一阶微分形式的不变性

## 1．一阶微分形式的不变性

设函数 $z=f(u, v)$ 具有连续偏导数，则有全微分

$$
d z=\frac{\partial z}{\partial u} d u+\frac{\partial z}{\partial v} d v ;
$$

又若 $u, v$ 是 $x, y$ 的函数，即 $u=\varphi(x, y), v=\psi(x, y)$ ，且有连续偏导，则 $z=f[\varphi(x, y), \psi(x, y)]$ 的全微分为

$$
\begin{aligned}
d z & =\frac{\partial z}{\partial x} d x+\frac{\partial z}{\partial y} d y \\
& =\left(\frac{\partial z}{\partial u} \cdot \frac{\partial u}{\partial x}+\frac{\partial z}{\partial v} \cdot \frac{\partial v}{\partial x}\right) d x+\left(\frac{\partial z}{\partial u} \cdot \frac{\partial u}{\partial y}+\frac{\partial z}{\partial v} \cdot \frac{\partial v}{\partial y}\right) d y
\end{aligned}
$$

$$
\begin{aligned}
& =\frac{\partial z}{\partial u}\left(\frac{\partial u}{\partial x} d x+\frac{\partial u}{\partial y} d y\right)+\frac{\partial z}{\partial v}\left(\frac{\partial v}{\partial x} d x+\frac{\partial v}{\partial y} d y\right) \\
& =\frac{\partial z}{\partial u} d u+\frac{\partial z}{\partial v} d v
\end{aligned}
$$

无论 $u, v$ 是自变量还是中间变量，都有

$$
d z=\frac{\partial z}{\partial u} d u+\frac{\partial z}{\partial v} d v
$$

这就是一阶全微分形式不变性。

## 2．一阶微分形式的不变性习例

例8 设 $z=e^{u} \sin v, u=x y, v=x+y$ ，求 $\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}, \frac{\partial z}{\partial y}$ ．例9 设 $z=f(x+y, x y), f$ 具有一阶连续偏导，求 $d z$ 。例10 设 $f^{\prime \prime}(t)$ 连续，$z=\frac{1}{x} f(x y)+y f(x+y)$ ，求 $\frac{\partial^{2} z}{\partial x \partial y}$ ．例 11 已知 $e^{-x y}-2 z+e^{z}=0$ ，求 $\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}$ 和 $\frac{\partial z}{\partial y}$ ．

## 例 8 设 $z=e^{u} \sin v, u=x y, v=x+y$ ，求 $\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}, \frac{\partial z}{\partial y}$ ．

解

$$
\begin{aligned}
& \mathrm{d} z=\mathrm{d}\left(e^{u} \sin v\right) \\
= & e^{u} \sin v \mathrm{~d} u+e^{u} \cos v \mathrm{~d} v \\
= & e^{x y}[\sin (x+y) \mathrm{d}(x y)+\cos (x+y) \mathrm{d}(x+y)] \\
= & e^{x y}[\sin (x+y)(y \mathrm{~d} x+x \mathrm{~d} y)+\cos (x+y)(\mathrm{d} x+\mathrm{d} y)] \\
= & e^{x y}[y \sin (x+y)+\cos (x+y)] \mathrm{d} x \\
\quad & \quad+e^{x y}[x \sin (x+y)+\cos (x+y)] \mathrm{d} y
\end{aligned}
$$

所以

$$
\begin{aligned}
& \frac{\partial z}{\partial x}=e^{x y}[y \cdot \sin (x+y)+\cos (x+y)] \\
& \frac{\partial z}{\partial y}=e^{x y}[x \cdot \sin (x+y)+\cos (x+y)]
\end{aligned}
$$

例9 设 $z=f(x+y, x y), f$ 具有一阶连续偏导，求 $d z$ 。
解

$$
\begin{aligned}
d z & =d f(x+y, x y) \\
& =f_{1}^{\prime} d(x+y)+f_{2}^{\prime} d(x y) \\
& =f_{1}^{\prime}(d x+d y)+f_{2}^{\prime}(x d y+y d x) \\
& =\left(f_{1}^{\prime}+y f_{2}^{\prime}\right) d x+\left(f_{1}^{\prime}+x f_{2}^{\prime}\right) d y
\end{aligned}
$$

例10 设 $f^{\prime \prime}(t)$ 连续，$z=\frac{1}{x} f(x y)+y f(x+y)$ ，求 $\frac{\partial^{2} z}{\partial x \partial y}$ ．首先给出求一阶偏导的几种方法。

解1 直接求微分，得

$$
\begin{aligned}
d z= & \frac{1}{x} d f(x y)+f(x y) d\left(\frac{1}{x}\right)+y d f(x+y)+f(x+y) d y \\
= & \frac{f^{\prime}(x y)}{x} d(x y)-\frac{1}{x^{2}} f(x y) d x+y f^{\prime}(x+y) d(x+y) \\
& +f(x+y) d y
\end{aligned}
$$

$$
\begin{aligned}
= & {\left[\frac{y}{x} f^{\prime}(x y)-\frac{f(x y)}{x^{2}}+y f^{\prime}(x+y)\right] d x } \\
& +\left[f^{\prime}(x y)+y f^{\prime}(x+y)+f(x+y)\right] d y \\
\therefore & \frac{\partial z}{\partial x}=\frac{y}{x} f^{\prime}(x y)-\frac{f(x y)}{x^{2}}+y f^{\prime}(x+y)
\end{aligned}
$$

解2 $\because z=\frac{1}{x} f(x y)+y f(x+y)$

$$
\therefore \frac{\partial z}{\partial x}=-\frac{1}{x^{2}} f(x y)+\frac{1}{x} f^{\prime}(x y) \cdot y+y f^{\prime}(x+y)
$$

## 解3 设 $u=x y, v=x+y$

则 $z=\frac{1}{x} f(u)+y f(v) \stackrel{\text { 令 }}{=} F(x, y, u, v)$

$$
\begin{aligned}
\frac{\partial z}{\partial x} & =\left(F_{1}^{\prime}, F_{2}^{\prime}, F_{3}^{\prime}, F_{4}^{\prime}\right)\left(\begin{array}{l}
1 \\
0 \\
y \\
1
\end{array}\right)=F_{1}^{\prime}+y F_{3}^{\prime}+F_{4}^{\prime} \\
& =-\frac{1}{x^{2}} f(u)+y \frac{1}{x} f^{\prime}(u)+y f^{\prime}(v) \\
& =-\frac{1}{x^{2}} f(x y)+\frac{y}{x} f^{\prime}(x y)+y f^{\prime}(x+y) \\
\therefore \frac{\partial^{2} z}{\partial x \partial y} & =y f^{\prime \prime}(x y)+y f^{\prime \prime}(x+y)+f^{\prime}(x+y)
\end{aligned}
$$

例 11 已知 $e^{-x y}-2 z+e^{z}=0$ ，求 $\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}$ 和 $\frac{\partial z}{\partial y}$ ．
解 $\quad \because d\left(e^{-x y}-2 z+e^{z}\right)=0$ ，

$$
\begin{aligned}
& \therefore e^{-x y} d(-x y)-2 d z+e^{z} d z=0 \\
& \left(e^{z}-2\right) d z=e^{-x y}(x d y+y d x) \\
& d z=\frac{y e^{-x y}}{e^{z}-2} d x+\frac{x e^{-x y}}{e^{z}-2} d y \\
& \frac{\partial z}{\partial x}=\frac{y e^{-x y}}{e^{z}-2}, \quad \frac{\partial z}{\partial y}=\frac{x e^{-x y}}{e^{z}-2} .
\end{aligned}
$$

## 内容小结

## 1．复合函数求导的链式法则

＂分段用乘，分叉用加，单路全导，叉路偏导＂
例如，$u=f(x, y, v), v=\varphi(x, y)$ ，

$$
\frac{\partial u}{\partial x}=f_{1}^{\prime}+f_{3}^{\prime} \cdot \varphi_{1}^{\prime} ; \quad \frac{\partial u}{\partial y}=f_{2}^{\prime}+f_{3}^{\prime} \cdot \varphi_{2}^{\prime}
$$

## 2．一阶微分形式的不变性

![](https://cdn.mathpix.com/cropped/21c19573-86ad-4a68-a129-1e9867cf349f-33.jpg?height=538&width=486&top_left_y=738&top_left_x=1898)

对 $z=f(u, v)$ ，不论 $u, v$ 是自变量还是因变量，

$$
\mathrm{d} z=f_{u}(u, v) \mathrm{d} u+f_{v}(u, v) \mathrm{d} v
$$

## 思考题

1．已知 $\left.f(x, y)\right|_{y=x^{2}}=1,\left.f_{1}^{\prime}(x, y)\right|_{y=x^{2}}=2 x$ ，求 $\left.f_{2}^{\prime}(x, y)\right|_{y=x^{2}}$ ．
解：由 $f\left(x, x^{2}\right)=1$ 两边对 $x$ 求导，得

$$
\begin{gathered}
f_{1}^{\prime}\left(x, x^{2}\right)+f_{2}^{\prime}\left(x, x^{2}\right) \cdot 2 x=0 \\
f_{1}^{\prime}\left(x, x^{2}\right)=2 x \\
f_{2}^{\prime}\left(x, x^{2}\right)=-1
\end{gathered}
$$

2．设函数 $z=f(x, y)$ 在点 $(1,1)$ 处可微，且

$$
f(1,1)=1,\left.\quad \frac{\partial f}{\partial x}\right|_{(1,1)}=2,\left.\quad \frac{\partial f}{\partial y}\right|_{(1,1)}=3,
$$

$\varphi(x)=f(x, f(x, x))$ ，求 $\left.\frac{\mathrm{d}}{\mathrm{d} x} \varphi^{3}(x)\right|_{x=1}$ 。（2001考研）
解：由题设 $\varphi(1)=f(1, f(1,1))=f(1,1)=1$

$$
\left.\begin{aligned}
& \left.\frac{\mathrm{d}}{\mathrm{~d} x} \varphi^{3}(x)\right|_{x=1}=\left.3 \varphi^{2}(x) \frac{\mathrm{d} \varphi}{\mathrm{~d} x}\right|_{x=1} \\
& \quad=3\left[f_{1}^{\prime}(x, f(x, x))\right. \\
& \left.\quad+f_{2}^{\prime}(x, f(x, x))\left(f_{1}^{\prime}(x, x)+f_{2}^{\prime}(x, x)\right)\right] \\
& =3 \cdot[2+3 \cdot(2+3)]=51
\end{aligned}\right|_{x=1}
$$
